nasb.text: ‘You shall do no injustice in judgment; you shall not be partial to the poor nor defer to the great, but you are to judge your neighbor fairly.

esv.text: “You shall do no injustice in court. You shall not be partial to the poor or defer to the great, but in righteousness shall you judge your neighbor.

cnv.text: “你們審判的時候，不可行不義；不可偏袒窮人，也不可偏幫有權勢的人；只要按著公義審判你的鄰舍。

ccb.text: 不可徇私枉法，不可偏袒穷人，不可谄媚权贵之人，要秉公审判。
